//roles: Each role -> { harness, model, extra_args }. The orchestrator enforces reviewer.family != re_reviewer.family.
//family: Family is derived by substring on model id (claude/gpt/gemini/llama/mistral/deepseek). Override with `family` field if needed.
//modes: Cursor planner uses --mode plan (read-only planning), reviewer/re_reviewer use --mode ask (read-only Q&A with read access for verification probes). Executor uses --force to skip per-command approval prompts.
//opt-in: Local models (llama-cpp/qwen3.6) are opt-in only — swap them in by editing this file; defaults never depend on `,llama-cpp serve` being up.

reflector.//: Optional post-run distillation; emits structured capsules into the AI KB. Runs only on workflow=feature/bugfix at successful completion.
